sb_prompt: FIND OUT WHAT CRITERIA THE OTHER CALLER WOULD USE IN SELECTING CHILD CARE SERVICES FOR A PRESCHOOLER.  IS IT EASY OR DIFFICULT TO FIND SUCH CARE?
turns: Hi, I'm looking for someone to talk to about child care options.
Hi, sure! I've used some child care services before, so I can share my experience.
What kind of child care services did you use in the past?
I used a local daycare center when my little sister was a toddler.
That sounds great. Can you tell me more about your experience with the daycare center?
It was a good experience overall, but the staff could be a bit inconsistent sometimes.
Sometimes the staff were really attentive and caring towards the kids, but other times they seemed a bit distracted or stressed.
I'm glad you had a good experience overall. What did you like most about the daycare center?
The thing I liked most was the variety of activities they offered. They had a great outdoor play area and a cozy indoor space for quiet times.
What do you think would be the most important criteria for me to consider when choosing child care for my preschooler?
I think the most important criteria would be the quality of care and attention the staff can provide to your child.
